spells.name: Blinding Flash
spells.range: 10 ft (3 m) radius, up to 60 ft (18.3 m) away
spells.savingThrowNote: -1 to save if 3 P.P.E. are pumped in; does not affect robotic/bionic/cybernetic eyes
spells.description: Blinds everyone in a 10 ft radius for 1D4 melees (-10 strike/parry/dodge).

spells.name: Cloud of Smoke
spells.description: Dense black smoke up to 30x30x30 ft; victims inside are -5 strike/parry/dodge/disarm/entangle.

spells.name: Death Trance
spells.description: The caster appears dead (no breathing/pulse). Helpless while in the trance; cancelable at will.

spells.name: Globe of Daylight
spells.range: Near self or up to 30 ft (9.1 m) away
spells.description: A globe of true daylight lighting a 12 ft area per level; wards off vampires/undead.

spells.name: Lantern Light
spells.range: 10 ft (3 m); can light up a room
spells.description: A dimmable floating light (50-300 watt equivalent). Not sunlight; no effect on vampires.

spells.name: See Aura
spells.description: Reveals level of experience, presence of magic/psionics, base P.P.E., possession, and health.

spells.name: See the Invisible
spells.description: See astral beings, entities, elementals, ghosts, and naturally/magically invisible things.

spells.name: Sense Evil
spells.description: Sense the presence and approximate number/location of (especially supernatural) evil.

spells.name: Sense Magic
spells.description: Sense magic being used/enchantments nearby, like a Geiger counter. Not psionics.

spells.name: Thunderclap
spells.range: 30 ft (9.1 m); heard up to 1 mile
spells.description: A booming thunderclap. Caster gets +5 initiative, +1 strike/parry/dodge; creates Horror Factor 8.

spells.name: Befuddle
spells.description: Confuses one victim: -2 strike/parry/dodge, attacks halved, all skills -20%.

spells.name: Chameleon
spells.description: Blend into surroundings: 90% undetectable if still, less while moving; ineffective if moving fast.

spells.name: Cleanse
spells.range: Self, one person up to 10 ft (3 m) away, or two people by touch
spells.description: Magically removes dirt, grime, and stains from a living being and the clothes they wear.

spells.name: Climb
spells.range: Self, or others up to 40 ft (12.2 m) away
spells.description: Climb with inhuman skill: 98% on climbable surfaces, 60% on smooth ones, rappel at 90%.

spells.name: Cloak of Darkness
spells.range: Self plus a 5 ft (1.5 m) radius around the character
spells.description: A field of darkness follows the caster; attackers beyond it are -3 to strike.

spells.name: Concealment
spells.range: Small objects up to 40 ft (12.2 m) away
spells.description: Hides one small non-living object (under 14 inches and 14 lbs) from all who fail to save.

spells.name: Detect Concealment
spells.description: Instantly negates Concealment spells and reveals mystically concealed objects.

spells.name: Extinguish Fire
spells.range: 20 ft (6.1 m) radius, cast up to 80 ft (24.4 m) away +10 ft (3 m) per level
spells.description: Instantly puts out fires; extinguishes up to 40 ft (12.2 m) per melee round.

spells.name: Fear
spells.range: 20 ft (6.1 m) diameter, up to 100 ft (30.5 m) away
spells.savingThrowNote: Save vs Horror Factor 16
spells.description: Washes an area in terror: failed saves are momentarily stunned, lose initiative and one melee attack.

spells.name: Heavy Breathing
spells.savingThrowNote: those who save are not affected/fearful
spells.description: Conjures frightful breathing sounds; those who fail may flee, others are -2 strike / -1 parry/dodge.

spells.name: Levitation
spells.description: Raise self/others/an object straight up and hover; up to 200 lbs +20 lbs per level.

spells.name: Manipulate Objects
spells.ppeNote: Two P.P.E. per five pounds (2.3 kg) of combined object weight
spells.range: 50 ft (15.2 m) +10 ft (3 m) per level; line of sight
spells.savingThrowNote: No save for inanimate objects; living beings are immune
spells.description: Telekinetically hold and carry small objects: two per level, 10 lbs (4.5 kg) each, magic P.S. 8 +1 per level.

spells.name: Turn Dead
spells.description: Turns/repels 1D6 animated dead per level for 24 hours. Not vampires/zombies/possessed corpses.

spells.name: Armor of Ithan
spells.description: Invisible mystic armor with M.D.C. 10 per level. Magic fire/lightning/cold do half damage to it.

spells.name: Breathe Without Air
spells.description: Function normally without air (underwater, vacuum). Protects vs natural/man-made gases, not magic toxins.

spells.name: Energy Bolt
spells.savingThrowNote: dodge of 18 or higher
spells.damage: 4D6 S.D.C. (6D6 on a ley line, 8D6 at a nexus)
spells.description: A mentally-directed energy bolt; one target per casting.

spells.name: Fingers of the Wind
spells.description: Conjure and manipulate wind to touch/tap/press objects under 10 lbs.

spells.name: Float in Air
spells.range: Self or others within 30 ft (9.1 m)
spells.description: Hover 1-2 ft above ground; slow a fall or float on water. -1 to all combat, half speed.

spells.name: Fuel Flame
spells.description: Doubles the size of an existing fire, up to a 100 ft area.

spells.name: Ignite Fire
spells.damage: 2D6 S.D.C. per melee (clothes/hair, after first 2 melees)
spells.description: Spontaneous combustion of flammable material (max 3 ft area). Cannot ignite contained volatiles.

spells.name: Impervious to Fire
spells.range: Self or others up to 60 ft (18.3 m) away
spells.description: Normal, magical, and Mega-Damage fire do no damage to the protected person or their gear.

spells.name: Impervious to Poison
spells.description: Temporarily impervious to poisons, venom, toxins, pollution, and poison gas.

spells.name: Invisibility: Simple
spells.range: Self only (includes clothes and articles on one's person)
spells.description: The caster turns completely invisible (retains mass and sound); -9 to be hit, -3 once cut.

spells.name: Life Source
spells.ppeNote: 2 P.P.E. plus sacrificed life force: two S.D.C. or one Hit Point per P.P.E. point gained
spells.description: Convert the caster's own S.D.C./Hit Points into P.P.E. for casting; painful and potentially lethal.

spells.name: Light Healing
spells.description: Channels healing energy by touch: restores 1D6 S.D.C. or 1D4 Hit Points (not both). Cannot be used on oneself.

spells.name: Magic Shield
spells.description: A pale energy shield with 60 M.D.C.: +1 to parry melee attacks, -8 to parry blasts and projectiles.

spells.name: Mystic Fulcrum
spells.range: Self or two others by touch
spells.description: The enchanted can lift 50% more weight and carry 10% more, moving loads they'd otherwise need leverage for.

spells.name: Negate Poison/Toxin
spells.description: Turns a poisonous substance inert or negates poison in the bloodstream; prior damage is not reversed.

spells.name: Paralysis: Lesser
spells.description: Paralyzes one of the victim's limbs per casting; no effect inside vehicles, robots, or M.D.C. armor.

spells.name: Resist Fire
spells.range: Self or one or two others, up to 60 ft (18.3 m)
spells.description: Heat has no ill effect; normal, magical, and Mega-Damage fire all do half damage.

spells.name: Blind
spells.description: Blinds one victim: -5 strike, -10 parry/dodge, 50% chance to stumble per 10 ft. Not vs enclosed armor/robots.

spells.name: Carpet of Adhesion
spells.description: A sticky carpet (up to 10x20 ft) anyone touching adheres to. Works even on cyborgs/robots/Supernatural P.S.

spells.name: Charismatic Aura
spells.description: Boosts P.B. by 8 and charms all in radius. Can invoke friendship/trust, power/fear (Horror Factor 13), or deception.

spells.name: Cure Minor Disorders
spells.savingThrowNote: only if unwanted
spells.description: Instantly relieves minor ailments (headache, nausea, low fever, muscle stiffness) and negates minor-disorder curses.

spells.name: Electric Arc
spells.description: A crackling bolt of blue energy; +2 to strike. Each blast counts as one melee attack.

spells.name: Energy Field
spells.range: Self or others up to 60 ft (18.3 m) away
spells.duration: 1 minute (4 melees) per level, or until destroyed
spells.description: A shimmering protective bubble (8 ft area) with 60 M.D.C.; doubled on a ley line, tripled at a nexus.

spells.name: Fire Bolt
spells.range: 100 ft (30.5 m) plus 5 ft (1.5 m) per level
spells.description: A directed bolt of magic fire, +4 to strike.

spells.name: Fist of Fury
spells.ppeNote: Ten to cast on oneself or fifty to cast upon another
spells.range: Self or one person by touch
spells.damage: Varies with P.S.: punches as Supernatural P.S., 1D6 M.D. minimum
spells.description: The dominant hand glows with fierce light and punches with Mega-Damage supernatural strength.

spells.name: Fool's Gold
spells.duration: 20 melees per level of the spell caster
spells.description: Makes any object appear to be made of gold; those who save recognize worthless fool's gold.

spells.name: Ley Line Transmission
spells.range: Limited by the length of the ley line
spells.savingThrowNote: A psionic Mind Block will block and destroy the message
spells.description: Sends a verbal/audio message along a ley line to recipients on it (one per level); one-way unless the receiver also knows the spell.

spells.name: Magic Net
spells.duration: 2 melees (30 seconds) per level of the spell caster
spells.savingThrowNote: Dodge of 16 or higher
spells.description: A net of magic fibers snares 1-6 human-sized victims, who are helpless until it is cut by M.D. weapons, magic, or dispelled.

spells.name: Multiple Image
spells.savingThrowNote: -4 to save; viewers who save may see through the illusion
spells.description: Three identical images mimic the mage's every move: +2 initiative, +2 dodge, +1 strike; only iron dispels an image.

spells.name: Repel Animals
spells.savingThrowNote: Standard save for animals
spells.description: Even hostile predators stop, turn, and leave without harming the mage; affects six animals at once.

spells.name: Shadow Meld
spells.description: Step into any 5 ft shadow and become totally invisible, even to See the Invisible; intense light dispels it.

spells.name: Swim as a Fish (lesser)
spells.range: Self or others up to 10 ft (3 m) away
spells.description: Swim at 96% (100x P.S. in yards without tiring), survive 600 ft (183 m) depths; +1 to parry and dodge in water.

spells.name: Trance
spells.description: Places the victim in a zombie-like hypnotic daze obeying only simple commands; cannot fight, betray friends, or reveal secrets.

spells.name: Armor Bizarre
spells.range: Self or one other up to 30 ft (9 m) away
spells.duration: 1 minute (4 melee rounds) per level of the spell caster
spells.savingThrowNote: Save vs Horror Factor only (HF 9, +1 per two levels of the caster)
spells.description: A form-fitting suit of writhing tentacles and slime: 15 M.D.C. per level; foes are -1 initiative and must save vs horror every melee.

spells.name: Calling
spells.range: 2 miles (3.2 km) per level of experience
spells.description: Telepathically call one known individual by full name; on a failed save the call repeats, compelling them to come.

spells.name: Charm
spells.duration: 4 melees (1 minute) per level of the spell caster
spells.description: The victim trusts the caster as a favorite friend, believing and helping them — though never against their own alignment.

spells.name: Circle of Flame
spells.description: A 5 ft (1.5 m) tall circle of flame around the caster; no combustible material required.

spells.name: Distant Voice
spells.range: 2000 ft (610 m) per level of experience; line of sight
spells.description: A two-way doorway for sound between two points; the caster must know (or see) the person spoken with.

spells.name: Domination
spells.description: Imposes the caster's will: the dazed victim fulfills commands (but never suicide, self-harm, or killing a loved one).

spells.name: Energy Disruption
spells.duration: 3 minutes (12 melees) per level of experience
spells.description: Temporarily knocks out any electrical device (unharmed, works perfectly when the magic elapses); not M.D.C. armor, robots, or military vehicles.

spells.name: Escape
spells.description: Magically escape any bonds or open any lock — rope, handcuffs, cells, trunks; one restraint or lock per invocation.

spells.name: Eyes of Thoth
spells.description: Read and understand ALL written languages, modern and ancient (spoken tongues still need Tongues or education).

spells.name: Featherlight
spells.range: Touch or up to 10 ft (3 m) away
spells.duration: 10 minutes per level of the spell caster
spells.description: Reduces one object's weight (up to 200 lbs/90 kg per level) to that of a feather; feather-light things are useless as weapons.

spells.name: Fly
spells.description: Bestows flight on an inanimate object free of metal or plastic (the witch's broom): 35 mph, 1000 ft max altitude, up to 6x6 ft.

spells.name: Heal Wounds
spells.savingThrowNote: Standard, if the person resists the magic
spells.description: Instantly heals minor physical wounds (cuts, gashes, bullet wounds, burns): restores 3D6 S.D.C. and 1D6 Hit Points.

spells.name: House of Glass
spells.duration: 1 minute per level of the spell caster
spells.damage: Special: attackers suffer damage identical to what they inflict on the caster
spells.savingThrowNote: Standard; gods are immune to this spell
spells.description: The enchanted victim cannot harm the spell caster without suffering the identical damage in return.

spells.name: Lifeblast
spells.range: One character up to 30 ft (9 m) away per level of experience, or two by touch
spells.damage: Varies: 1D6 vs mummies/zombies (HF 16), 1D6x10 vs vampires, 4D6 S.D.C. vs necromancers
spells.savingThrowNote: Varies; typically none — automatically hits its target
spells.description: A blast of renewing life energy: the living gain +3 initiative and +1 on all rolls for a melee; negates animated dead and drives away the undead.

spells.name: Sleep
spells.range: Touch or one foot (0.3 m) away
spells.duration: Becomes inert within 15 minutes; effects last 10 minutes per level
spells.description: Turns normal food or drink into a sleep-inducing potion; the sleeper cannot be awakened until the magic lapses.

spells.name: Superhuman Endurance
spells.range: Self or one person up to 10 ft (3 m) away, or two by touch
spells.savingThrowNote: Standard, provided the character resists its magic
spells.description: Tireless supernatural stamina for the duration; lift/carry 10% more and +2 to save vs disease, poison, and toxins.

spells.name: Superhuman Speed
spells.duration: 1 minute (4 melee rounds) per level of experience
spells.description: Speed attribute of 44 (30 mph/48 km), +2 to parry and +6 to dodge; all movement without fatigue.

spells.name: Superhuman Strength
spells.duration: 2 melee rounds (30 seconds) per level of experience
spells.description: Grants a Supernatural P.S. of 30, P.E. of 24, and +30 S.D.C. for the duration of the magic.

spells.name: Call Lightning
spells.damage: 1D6 M.D. per level of the spell caster
spells.description: A lightning bolt shoots down from the sky onto any target in the caster's line of vision.

spells.name: Compulsion
spells.range: 60 ft (18.3 m) and within line of vision
spells.description: Implants an irresistible desire or need; the victim is obsessed until it is attained or the magic ends.

spells.name: Cure Illness
spells.savingThrowNote: None; standard if the person resists treatment
spells.description: Cures ordinary bacterial disease and illness (fever, flu); not cancer, wounds, broken bones, or magic sickness.

spells.name: Fire Ball
spells.damage: 1D4 M.D. per level of the spell caster
spells.savingThrowNote: None except dodge; the victim must know the attack is coming and roll 18 or higher
spells.description: A large, magically directed fire ball that seldom misses.

spells.name: Impervious to Energy
spells.duration: 2 minutes (8 melees) per level of experience
spells.description: Impervious to all forms of energy — fire, heat, electricity, lasers; physical attacks do normal damage.

spells.name: Magic Pigeon
spells.duration: Two months per level of the spell caster
spells.description: A mystic pigeon delivers a spoken (30 words) or written message anywhere in the world, flying 720 miles a day.

spells.name: Mask of Deceit
spells.savingThrowNote: Viewers save at -4; the inattentive are fooled automatically
spells.description: An illusionary mask over the caster's facial features: age, gender, skin, hair composed by thought.

spells.name: Reduce Self (6 inches)
spells.duration: 10 melees per level of spell caster
spells.description: Shrinks the caster, clothes and possessions to six inches tall; reduced M.D. weapons do a single point of S.D.C.

spells.name: Sheltering Force
spells.range: Around self, or up to 20 ft (6.1 m) away
spells.duration: One hour per level of experience
spells.description: A semi-opaque dome tent of force for two to eight people: keeps out rain and insects, stops 1D6 M.D. per attack; outside attackers are -3 to strike.

spells.name: Teleport: Lesser
spells.range: Five miles (8 km) per level of experience; touch
spells.description: Instantly transmits a touched non-living object (up to 50 lbs) to any known location; success 80% +2% per level.

spells.name: Tongues
spells.duration: 3 minutes (12 melees) per level of experience
spells.description: Perfectly understand and speak all spoken languages at 98% (written languages need Eyes of Thoth).

spells.name: Words of Truth
spells.duration: 1 minute (4 melees) per level of experience
spells.savingThrowNote: A saving throw for EACH question asked; a save means that question need not be answered
spells.description: Compels truthful answers; the caster can ask two brief questions per melee round.

spells.name: Agony
spells.range: 5 ft (1.5 m) per level of experience
spells.damage: Special: incapacitating pain, no physical damage
spells.description: The victim writhes in pain — no attacks, movement, skills, or speech — then fights at half for another minute.

spells.name: Animate and Control Dead
spells.duration: 5 minutes (20 melees) per level of experience
spells.description: Animate corpses or skeletons (two, plus one per level) as mindless puppets: 2 attacks each, Spd 7, 1D6 damage.

spells.name: Ballistic Fire
spells.range: 1000 ft (305 m) +10 ft (3 m) per level of experience
spells.savingThrowNote: Victims can attempt to dodge at -10 without benefit of any other bonuses
spells.description: One magically guided fiery missile per level, fired at any mix of targets in a single spell attack.

spells.name: Constrain Being
spells.duration: 2 minutes (8 melee rounds) per level of experience
spells.description: Holds a lesser supernatural creature at bay with simple commands, the way a cross holds a vampire.

spells.name: Dispel Magic Barriers
spells.savingThrowNote: The attacked spell itself saves vs magic (12) as if it were a person
spells.description: Negates magic barriers of any kind: Sorcerer's Seal, Carpet of Adhesion, wall and ward spells.

spells.name: Fly as the Eagle
spells.range: Self or two others by touch, or cast upon one up to 100 ft (30.5 m) away
spells.duration: 20 minutes per level of the spell caster
spells.description: True flight at up to 50 mph: +1 parry, +2 dodge, +2 damage on a diving attack; spells can be cast while flying.

spells.name: Globe of Silence
spells.duration: 6 melee rounds per level of the spell caster
spells.savingThrowNote: No save (the space itself is altered); Negate Magic can dispel the globe
spells.description: An invisible 10 ft radius globe that stops all sound; incantation-reliant casters inside are powerless.

spells.name: Heal Self
spells.description: A minute of meditative chant washes the mage with mystic energy: restores 3D6 S.D.C. and 1D6 Hit Points, healing cuts, bruises, and broken bones.

spells.name: Invisibility (Superior)
spells.range: Self or one other by touch
spells.duration: 3 minutes (12 melees) per level of experience
spells.description: Invisible to ALL detection — optics, heat, motion, smell; broken the instant the character attacks.

spells.name: Life Drain
spells.duration: 2 melees (30 seconds) per level of experience
spells.damage: Special: S.D.C. and Hit Points reduced by half
spells.description: Debilitating weakness: the victim's S.D.C., H.P., and speed are halved, one less attack per melee, skills -10%.

spells.name: Lightblade
spells.duration: 1 minute (4 melee rounds) per level of experience
spells.damage: 1D4x10 +1 M.D. point per level of experience
spells.savingThrowNote: Parry or dodge
spells.description: A weightless sword of brilliant white light: +1 to strike, double damage to vampires and demons vulnerable to light.

spells.name: Metamorphosis: Animal
spells.description: Transform completely into an animal — cat to alligator — keeping speech, memory, S.D.C., and Hit Points.

spells.name: Purification
spells.description: Purifies up to 50 lbs of food or 10 gallons of water, cleansing disease, bacteria, and poison/toxins.

spells.name: Wind Rush
spells.savingThrowNote: A roll of 18, 19 or 20 saves from losing balance and items
spells.description: A 60 mph wind gust knocks people down, blows objects 20-120 ft, and holds the caught helpless.
